Updates

Made with in India

Terms and Conditions

Effective Date: March 04, 2026

Welcome to BS Marriage Connect. These Terms and Conditions ("Terms") govern your use of our website and mobile application (collectively, the "Platform"). By accessing or using our Platform, you agree to be bound by these Terms.

1. Eligibility

To register as a member of BS Marriage Connect or use this Platform, you must be legally competent and of legal marriageable age as per the laws of India (currently 18 years or above for females and 21 years or above for males). The Platform is intended solely for personal use by individual members to find life partners and is not for commercial purposes.

2. Account Security

You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your login credentials (username and password) and for all activities that occur under your account. You agree to provide accurate information and notify us immediately of any unauthorized use.

3. Content and Conduct

You are solely responsible for the content (photos, text, information) you post on the Platform. You agree not to post any content that is offensive, defamatory, obscene, or violates the rights of others.

4. Privacy

Your privacy is important to us. Please refer to our Privacy Policy to understand how we collect, use, and disclose your personal information.

5. Membership and Subscription Fees

Some features require a paid subscription. Fees are non-refundable except as provided in our Refund Policy. All payments are processed through secure gateways (e.g., Razorpay).

6. Disclaimer of Warranties

BS Marriage Connect does not guarantee the accuracy of member profiles or the success of any match. Users are advised to exercise caution and perform their own due diligence.

7. Contact Information

If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us at bsmarriageconnect87@gmail.com or call us at +91 96761 75789.

Privacy Policy

Last Updated: March 04, 2026

At BS Marriage Connect, your privacy is our top priority. We are committed to protecting the personal information you share with us.

1. Information We Collect

We collect information you provide directly to us (name, photo, phone number, community) and data about your use of our Platform to improve our matching services.

2. How We Use Information

We use your information to facilitate matches, improve our services, communicate with you, and ensure the safety of our community.

3. Data Security

We implement bank-level security measures to protect your data from unauthorized access, loss, or disclosure.

4. Your Controls

You have full control over your profile visibility. You can choose who sees your name and photos in your profile settings.

5. Contact & Support

For any privacy-related inquiries or support, please reach out to us at bsmarriageconnect87@gmail.com or call us at +91 96761 75789.
